description: 4.5V to 17V Input, 10A Synchronous SWIFT™ Step-Down Converter

1.name: AGND
1.description: Ground of internal analog circuitry. AGND must be connected to PGND for proper operation.

2.name: VIN
2.description: Input voltage supply pin. Power for the internal circuit and the connection to drain of high-side MOSFET.

3.name: VIN
3.description: Input voltage supply pin. Power for the internal circuit and the connection to drain of high-side MOSFET.

4.name: PGND
4.description: Ground return for low-side power MOSFET and its drivers.

8.name: SW
8.description: Switching node. Connected to the source of the high-side MOSFET and drain of the low-side MOSFET.

9.name: SW
9.description: Switching node. Connected to the source of the high-side MOSFET and drain of the low-side MOSFET.

10.name: SW
10.description: Switching node. Connected to the source of the high-side MOSFET and drain of the low-side MOSFET.

11.name: SW
11.description: Switching node. Connected to the source of the high-side MOSFET and drain of the low-side MOSFET.

18.name: BOOT
18.description: Floating supply voltage for high-side MOSFET gate drive circuit. Connect a 0.1-μF ceramic capacitor between BOOT and SW pins.

19.name: PGOOD
19.description: Open-drain power good indicator. It is asserted low if output voltage is outside if the PGOOD thresholds.

20.name: EN
20.description: Enable pin. Float or pull high to enable the device. Connect a resistor divider to this pin to implement adjustable UVLO.

21.name: SS/TRK
21.description: Soft-start and tracking pin. Connecting an external capacitor sets the soft-start time.

22.name: COMP
22.description: Error amplifier output and input to the PWM modulator. Connect loop compensation to this pin.

23.name: FB
23.description: Converter feedback input. Connect to the output voltage with a resistor divider.

24.name: RT/CLK
24.description: Switching frequency setting pin. In RT mode, an external timing resistor adjusts the switching frequency. In CLK mode, the device synchronizes to an external clock input.

EP.name: Thermal PAD
EP.description: Exposed thermal pad. Connect to PGND pins and to internal ground planes using multiple vias for good thermal performance.

• AGND must be connected to PGND on the PCB. Connect AGND to PGND in a region away from switching
